name: Senren＊Banka
description: Senren＊Banka is a Japanese-style visual novel produced by Yuzusoft, a Japanese developer of romance VNs. This game commemorated Yuzusoft's 10th anniversary. It won numerous awards on the year of its release in Japan for its art, music, and characters.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows10/8/7/Vista
  • Processor: Core2Duo 2.4Ghz
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 256M
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM
